note: seq=106: (1) OPERATIONAL SELF-TUNING ADVISOR (atlas_ops_advisor, hourly) -- reads live signals (queue depth/growth, drain rate, active conns, per-box rates) and emits RANKED ops recommendations to ops-recommendations.json: cadence tuning (auto_safe), crawl-bound vs DB-bound diagnosis, worker/lane scaling honesty, and ESCALATED big-bets (3rd box / Common Crawl bulk to break the >2k crawl-bound ceiling). The improvement engine surfaces these. (2) THROTTLE the backfill 100k/10min -> 20k/30min because it was outpacing drain ~12x (pending grew to 1.3M). selftest PASS 4/4; verified complete.

steps.note: seq=106: ops self-tuning advisor (hourly) + backfill throttle (was outpacing drain).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_ops_advisor.py':'6d090eb6d3ae421e9ff30e4983d1884e67836998602dbaba75c4fcdd12746e25'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('ops sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS operational self-tuning advisor (ranked ops recommendations)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_ops_advisor.py
TimeoutStartSec=60

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS ops advisor timer (hourly)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=3min
OnUnitActiveSec=1h
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS continuous re-enrichment backfill (throttled to match drain)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=ATLAS_REQUEUE_N=20000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_requeue.py 20000
TimeoutStartSec=120

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS backfill timer (30min -- throttled to not outpace drain)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=5min
OnUnitActiveSec=30min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','restart','atlas-backfill.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-ops-advisor.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-ops-advisor.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-ops-advisor.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-ops-advisor.service']); print('ops-advisor live + backfill throttled')"
